mapper.select: select id, teacher_account, teacher_name, teacher_level, student_account, student_name, student_level, org_id, org_name, pair_status, start_date, end_date, sign_file_url, create_account, create_time, update_account, update_time from tb_teacher_student_pair where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_teacher_student_pair(teacher_account, teacher_name, teacher_level, student_account, student_name, student_level, org_id, org_name, pair_status, start_date, end_date, sign_file_url, create_account, create_time, update_account, update_time) values (#{teacherAccount}, #{teacherName}, #{teacherLevel}, #{studentAccount}, #{studentName}, #{studentLevel}, #{orgId}, #{orgName}, #{pairStatus}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{signFileUrl}, #{createAccount}, #{createTime}, #{updateAccount}, #{updateTime})

insert into tb_teacher_student_pair(teacher_account, teacher_name, teacher_level, student_account, student_name, student_level, org_id, org_name, pair_status, start_date, end_date, sign_file_url, create_account, create_time, update_account, update_time) values
(#{entity.teacherAccount}, #{entity.teacherName}, #{entity.teacherLevel}, #{entity.studentAccount}, #{entity.studentName}, #{entity.studentLevel}, #{entity.orgId}, #{entity.orgName}, #{entity.pairStatus}, #{entity.startDate}, #{entity.endDate}, #{entity.signFileUrl}, #{entity.createAccount}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateAccount}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into tb_teacher_student_pair(teacher_account, teacher_name, teacher_level, student_account, student_name, student_level, org_id, org_name, pair_status, start_date, end_date, sign_file_url, create_account, create_time, update_account, update_time) values
(#{entity.teacherAccount}, #{entity.teacherName}, #{entity.teacherLevel}, #{entity.studentAccount}, #{entity.studentName}, #{entity.studentLevel}, #{entity.orgId}, #{entity.orgName}, #{entity.pairStatus}, #{entity.startDate}, #{entity.endDate}, #{entity.signFileUrl}, #{entity.createAccount}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateAccount}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update teacher_account = values(teacher_account), teacher_name = values(teacher_name), teacher_level = values(teacher_level), student_account = values(student_account), student_name = values(student_name), student_level = values(student_level), org_id = values(org_id), org_name = values(org_name), pair_status = values(pair_status), start_date = values(start_date), end_date = values(end_date), sign_file_url = values(sign_file_url), create_account = values(create_account), create_time = values(create_time), update_account = values(update_account), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update:
update tb_teacher_student_pair
teacher_account = #{teacherAccount},
teacher_name = #{teacherName},
teacher_level = #{teacherLevel},
student_account = #{studentAccount},
student_name = #{studentName},
student_level = #{studentLevel},
org_id = #{orgId},
org_name = #{orgName},
pair_status = #{pairStatus},
start_date = #{startDate},
end_date = #{endDate},
sign_file_url = #{signFileUrl},
create_account = #{createAccount},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_account = #{updateAccount},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
